task_completion.description: Navigate the map view to the Bering Strait showing Big and Little Diomede Islands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view shows two islands separated by a channel at approximately 65.75°N, 169°W. Big Diomede is the larger island to the west, Little Diomede is the smaller to the east.

task_completion.description: Create a placemark on Big Diomede Island labeled 'Big Diomede (Russia)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pin or marker is visible on the larger western island with the label 'Big Diomede (Russia)'.

task_completion.description: Create a placemark on Little Diomede Island labeled 'Little Diomede (USA)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pin or marker is visible on the smaller eastern island with the label 'Little Diomede (USA)'.

task_completion.description: Use the measurement tool to measure the distance between the two islands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler tool, measurement line, or distance overlay is visible connecting the two islands on the map.

task_completion.description: Create a third placemark named 'Diomede Distance'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark labeled 'Diomede Distance' is visible in the 'Places' panel or on the map.

task_completion.description: Record the measured distance (approx 3.8 km) in the description of the 'Diomede Distance' placemark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties or description window for the 'Diomede Distance' placemark is open and displays a value between 3.0 km and 5.0 km.

task_completion.description: Save the placemarks to the specified KML file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window shows the file 'diomede_measurement.kml' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI mapping application (e.g., Marble, Google Earth).
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application with a rendered globe/map, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the distance was obtained via tool usage, not guessed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement tool/line is visible on the map before or during the creation of the distance placemark.

integrity.description: Verify the KML file was not manually written in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not appear to be typing raw XML/KML code into a text editor to generate the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Big Diomede Island is the larger, western island (approx 65.78°N, 169.06°W). Little Diomede Island is the smaller, eastern island (approx 65.75°N, 168.92°W). The typical distance between them is 3.8 km; acceptable measured values range from 3.0 km to 5.0 km.
